# Playla

> Playla is an AI companion for children aged 4-12 that provides personalized bedtime stories, Socratic homework help, emotion awareness, and social learning in multiple languages (English, Spanish, French, German, Portuguese, Mandarin, and more).

## Key Facts
- Age range: 4-12 years
- Languages: English, Spanish, French, German, Portuguese, Mandarin, and more
- Curriculum alignment: Common Core, national, and international standards
- Privacy: COPPA compliant, end-to-end encrypted
- Platform: iOS, Android, Web
- Status: Beta with 200+ families

## Features
- Personalised bedtime stories and voice conversations
- Socratic homework guidance (never gives direct answers)
- Real-time emotion detection with parent alerts
- Multi-child social learning network
- Parent dashboard with learning, emotional, and social health metrics

## Links
- [Home](https://www.playla.org/)
- [Waitlist](https://www.playla.org/#waitlist)
